title: dactylorhiza praetermissa subsp. junialis
intro: Dactylorhiza praetermissa subsp. junialis, also known as the Juniper-leaved Spurred Orchid, is a subspecies of orchid found in Ireland and other parts of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The Juniper-leaved Spurred Orchid is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to make teas and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
